title: Replace About section profile photo with uploaded real portrait

requirements.text: In the About section (AboutSection.tsx), replace the current profile photo with the uploaded image 'my portfolio image-1.jpg', saved as 'frontend/public/assets/generated/debraj-profile.jpg'. The image must be rendered inside the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2] (the photo container div). Use the generated asset path as the src. Preserve all existing styling (rounded corners, border, shadow, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: The About section profile photo displays the exact uploaded portrait of Debraj Paul (young man with glasses, teal background, white t-shirt).
The photo container retains its original shape, border, and shadow styling.
No AI-generated or placeholder portrait is used.

constraints: Use the exact uploaded photo (my portfolio image-1.jpg) — do not generate or alter the image in any way.
Only modify the profile photo element identified by the provided XPath in AboutSection.tsx.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Changing any other section's content or layout.
Altering the styling or design of the About section beyond swapping the image src.

edits: Use the uploaded photo exactly as-is, resized to portrait dimensions (my portfolio image-1.jpg > debraj-profile.dim_400x480.jpg)
